hypotheses.name: SV2/SV3 12-layer × 9-compartment scan
hypotheses.method: SVD of 209-gene mean-centered embedding at each of 12 layers. Project genes onto SV2 and SV3. Take top-K=52 and bottom-K=52 genes. Fisher exact OR and empirical null (N=200 gene-label shuffles) for 9 GO compartments (mitochondrion, ER_lumen, extracellular_vesicle, cytoskeleton, plasma_membrane, nucleus, secreted, cytoplasm, lysosome). Novel: first SV2/SV3 systematic scan.
hypotheses.result_value: 61 of 216 cells significant (emp_p<0.05); SV2 cytoskeleton OR=20.35, SV2 mito OR=6.36, SV2 EV OR=4.2–5.4
hypotheses.next_action: Characterize SV2 cytoskeleton genes (which cytoskeletal genes?), test SV2 co-pole stability across layers with Spearman r, extend to Geneformer embeddings for cross-model validation.

hypotheses.name: TRRUST TF-target co-pole test in SVD geometry
hypotheses.method: At layer 11, compute SVD of 209-gene embedding. For SV1 and SV2, define top-K=52 and bottom-K=52 poles. 326 TRRUST TF-target pairs with both genes in our 209-gene set. Measure co-pole rate (both genes in same pole). Null: N=1000 random same-size gene pairs sampled from named genes.
hypotheses.result_value: SV1: obs=0.163 vs null=0.123, emp_p=0.016; SV2: obs=0.206 vs null=0.122, emp_p=0.000
hypotheses.next_action: Extend across all 12 layers to find peak regulatory co-pole signal. Test STRING PPI pairs for similar co-pole enrichment. Test activation vs repression edge types separately.

hypotheses.name: SV1/SV2/SV3 spectral ratio profile + annotation density confounder check
hypotheses.method: At each of 12 layers, compute SVD of 209-gene embedding. Track SV1/SV2/SV3 variance fractions and SV1/SV2 magnitude ratio. Also: Spearman r between n_ann and best OR across layers per SV×compartment to test annotation-density confound.
hypotheses.result_value: 0 annotation-density confounders; SV1 var 19%→77% monotone; SV2 peaks L8=9.9% then drops; SV1/SV2 ratio 1.83→3.46
hypotheses.next_action: Use SV2 L8 peak as anchor for mito transient investigation. Validate spectral profile trend holds in Geneformer embeddings.
